mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qp_snapshot_synonym ( snapshot_id, source_rule_id, source_text, direction, targets_json, enabled, remark, created_at ) SELECT #{snapshotId}, id, source_text, direction, targets_json, enabled, remark, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM qp_rule_synonym WHERE resource_set_id = #{resourceSetId}

INSERT INTO qp_rule_synonym ( resource_set_id, source_text, direction, targets_json, enabled, remark, created_at, updated_at ) SELECT #{resourceSetId}, source_text, direction, targets_json, enabled, remark, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM qp_snapshot_synonym WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId}
